text: DAVID WEIR / BERGERON record packet. Legal cover sheet. Fax transmission date 12/03/2021. Printed 12/04/2021. Certification affidavit and current timestamp 12/04/2021. No clinical encounter on this page.
DATE OF SERVICE: 02/02/2019. Work-related head injury after being struck by a pipe from the derrick while working on a drill rig.
DATE OF SERVICE: 05/24/2021. Neurology follow-up for postconcussive syndrome with headaches and memory symptoms. The old 02/02/2019 injury date is discussed only as history.
DATE OF PROCEDURE: 06/22/2021. Left C7 transforaminal epidural steroid injection performed under fluoroscopy for cervical radicular pain. Signed 06/23/2021.
DATE OF SERVICE: 08/22/2021. Neurology follow-up with migraine headaches. Topiramate dose was increased and follow-up was recommended.
DATE OF SERVICE: 11/29/2021. Telephone follow-up for persistent migraines and postconcussive syndrome. The patient remained symptomatic despite treatment.
